spec.doc: Parcel Post and Express Post - Label & Barcode Specification v1.4

rules.title: Parcel Post header branding
rules.description: Parcel Post labels carry the Parcel Post product header and may print in black and white.

messages.pass: Header branding is consistent with a Parcel Post label.
messages.fail: Header text suggests Express Post branding on a Parcel Post audit: {actual}.
messages.missing: Product header text was not extracted. Confirm the Parcel Post header visually on the preview.
